business_context: Core Services leadership is reviewing Q2 delivery risk by comparing closed-work allocation against the target portfolio mix and checking whether reliability/security SLA spillover needs escalation.

endpoint_hints.description: Portfolio work items can be filtered by product and quarter.
Additional product work items are available for the broader review.
Additional item history for the product is available.
Portfolio targets can be filtered by product and quarter.
SLA targets are provided by category and severity.
Team and owner metadata are available.
